title: 3 Stocks to Buy if Coronavirus Second Wave Hits
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Will there be a second wave? Scientists around the world are evaluating that question out of concern for public health. Investors want to know what it means for their portfolios. Which stocks will do well if Coronavirus spikes again?[ ](https://tickeron.com/app/home/)CEO of Tickeron, Sergey Savastiouk,[ ](https://tickeron.com/app/home/)gives some insight into that. 

[https://tickeron.com/blogs/3-stocks-to-buy-if-coronavirus-second-wave-hits-7164](https://tickeron.com/blogs/3-stocks-to-buy-if-coronavirus-second-wave-hits-7164)
